name: C-5 --emit writes a verifier-output JSON file with pr_sha and verdict per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --emit verify.json --verdict concur --pr-sha abc123 2>err.txt && [ -s verify.json ] && grep -q '"pr_sha":"abc123"' verify.json && grep -q '"verdict":"concur"' verify.json && echo emitted 1>&2
